Tests that `Math.log(NaN)` returns `NaN` using an assertion.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.log` function when its input is `NaN` (Not-a-Number). It uses the `assert` function to check that the result of `Math.log(NaN)` is also `NaN`. This test ensures that the `Math.log` function conforms to the expected mathematical behavior when handling `NaN` inputs. The script provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on this single mathematical operation and its edge case handling.
